raw_transcript: Not great, Dr. Chen. My stomach is a mess. Every time I eat, I get this dull, gnawing pain right in the center of my upper belly. It goes straight through to my back. It makes me not want to eat at all.
final_corrected_note: Not great, Dr. Chen. My stomach is a mess. Every time I eat, I get this dull, gnawing pain right in the center of my upper belly. It goes straight through to my back. It makes me not want to eat at all.
